tasks.title: Add --help + examples (and docstring) to scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs
evidence: scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs has a shebang and is executable but does not implement --help or usage output.
scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs lacks a top-of-file docstring describing its purpose and non-goals.
plan: Add a module docstring describing the test runner's responsibility, non-goals, and assumptions.
Implement --help/-h output with usage and examples (or drop executable bit if it's not meant to be run directly).
Add a small smoke test to ensure --help exits successfully.

tasks.title: Wire strip_openapi_todos script tests into CI
evidence: Makefile test/test-ci targets only run go test and web tests; scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs is not invoked.
web/package.json has no script that runs scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs.
plan: Add a script target (pnpm or Makefile) to run scripts/strip_openapi_todos.test.mjs.
Ensure make test and make test-ci include the script test without adding long-running steps.
Update docs if a new command is added.

tasks.title: Add module docstrings to apperrors files
evidence: internal/apperrors/apperrors.go begins with `package apperrors` and has no file-level docstring.
internal/apperrors/sanitize.go and internal/apperrors/sentinels.go also start with package declarations without docstrings.
plan: Add top-of-file docstrings describing responsibilities, non-goals, and invariants.
Ensure docstrings align with AGENTS.md requirements for every code file.

tasks.title: Add module docstrings to jobs and manage CLI files
evidence: internal/jobs/job_create.go, job_run.go, and helpers.go start with package declarations without file-level docstrings.
internal/cli/manage/pipeline_js_mgmt.go and render_profiles.go start with package declarations without docstrings.
plan: Add file docstrings documenting responsibility, non-goals, and invariants for each listed file.
Keep docstrings concise and aligned with AGENTS.md expectations.
